case_title: THOMAS FRITZLER VS. PKM BUILDERS INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE NOT LISTED. SERVED MAY-08-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEPTEMBER 14, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,925.00 FILED BY FRITZLER, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PKM BUILDERS INC. MAYORGA, PERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED JUL-14-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PKM BUILDERS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-14-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS FRITZLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PKM BUILDERS INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PERRY MAYORGA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SUBMITS PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO PERRY MAYORGA IN OPEN COURT. THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED. PKM BUILDERS INC., HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. CASE CONTINUED TO CURE THE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT PERRY MAYORGA AND TO ALLOW SERVICE ON DEFENDANT PKM BUILDERS. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED JUL-14-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, PERRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF THOMAS FRITZLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PKM BUILDERS INC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PERRY MAYORGA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOFS OF SERVICES ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRITZLER, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PKM BUILDERS INC. MAYORGA, PERRY $3,925.00 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
